info.title: Ghar Ka Mali API
info.description:
Complete gardening platform API — Customer, Gardener, Supervisor & Admin panels.

**Static OTP for development:** `123456` (set `USE_STATIC_OTP=true` in .env)

**Admin seed credentials:** Phone `9999999999` / Password `Admin@123`

**Auth flow:** `POST /auth/send-otp` → `POST /auth/verify-otp` → use returned `token` as `Bearer <token>`

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: OTP login for customers & gardeners; password login for admin/supervisor

tags.name: Gardener
tags.description: Gardener app — jobs, location, profile, earnings

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Customer booking management — create, track, rate

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP via SMS. In dev mode (`USE_STATIC_OTP=true`), OTP is always `123456` and returned in response.

200.description: OTP sent. In dev mode, OTP field returned in response.

post.summary: Verify OTP → login or auto-register customer
post.description: Verifies OTP. Creates a new customer account if phone doesn't exist. Returns JWT token.
Password-based login for admin and supervisor roles. Seed admin: phone `9999999999`, password `Admin@123`.
OTP-based login for approved gardeners. Returns token + gardener profile.

403.description: Account not yet approved by admin

post.description: Submit gardener registration. Admin approval required before login.

200.description: User profile. Includes gardenerProfile for gardener role.

get.summary: Get gardener's own full profile with assigned zones

post.description: Creates a booking and auto-assigns nearest available gardener. Sends WhatsApp confirmation.

201.description: Booking created with OTP for visit verification

200.description: Paginated bookings with gardener and zone details
Full booking with customer, gardener, zone, last tracking point

post.summary: Verify visit OTP to start job (Gardener)
post.description: Customer shares their booking OTP with gardener. Gardener enters it to officially start the visit. Timer begins.

200.description: Visit started, status → in_progress, WhatsApp sent to customer

put.summary: Update booking status + upload work proof (Gardener)
put.description: Gardener updates status through: en_route → arrived → in_progress (via OTP) → completed/failed. Work images uploaded on completion.

200.description: Status updated. On completion: extra billing applied, customer notified via WhatsApp + push
Rating submitted. Gardener average rating auto-updated.

400.description: Cannot cancel booking in current status (only pending/assigned)

post.description: Called every 30s by gardener app. Broadcasts via Socket.io to customer tracking room.

booking_id.description: If provided, creates a tracking record

get.summary: Get gardener's current location for real-time tracking

200.description: Jobs with customer details and zone
Period breakdown + totals (jobs, earnings, avg rating)

get.summary: Get add-on services for a booking

post.summary: Add extra services to a booking (Customer)
post.description: Adds add-on services to a pending/assigned booking. Total amount auto-updated.

200.description: List of subscription and on-demand plans

post.description: Creates subscription and auto-schedules visits (Mon-Sat, no weekends). WhatsApp confirmation sent.

get.summary: Check if a location is in a serviceable zone

post.description: Returns PayU parameters. Client should POST these to PayU payment URL.

200.description: payment_id + payu_url + params to POST to PayU

post.summary: PayU success callback (called by PayU gateway)
post.description: PayU posts here on successful payment. Verifies hash, updates booking/subscription status.

post.summary: PayU failure callback (called by PayU gateway)

get.summary: Check payment status by transaction ID

post.description: Upload a plant image. If `PLANT_ID_API_KEY` is set, uses Plant.id API for identification. Otherwise returns default care instructions.

200.description: Plant name, scientific name, care instructions, watering schedule, fertilizer tips, sunlight requirements, confidence score

get.summary: Get blog post by slug (full content)

200.description: Full blog post. View count incremented.

get.summary: Get all active city SEO landing pages
Get city SEO page by slug

200.description: City page with hero, content, SEO meta

put.summary: Mark a specific notification as read

200.description: All unread notifications marked as read

post.description: Auto-assigns to gardener's supervisor. Customer & supervisor receive WhatsApp notification.

201.description: Complaint raised. Supervisor notified via WhatsApp.

get.description: Supervisors only see complaints assigned to them.

200.description: Complaints with customer, gardener, supervisor details
Customer's complaints with booking & gardener details

put.summary: Update complaint — assign, escalate, or resolve (Admin/Supervisor)
put.description: On resolve: customer notified via WhatsApp, auto penalty applied to gardener (₹50).

parameters.name: supervisor_id
parameters.description: Admin only: view another supervisor's team

200.description: Gardener stats: completion rate, rewards, penalties, job counts
Platform stats: users, bookings, revenue, active subscriptions, recent bookings
Revenue trends, zone performance, city distribution, user growth, top gardeners, subscription plan distribution, repeat customers, rating by zone
Gardener user + profile + assigned zones + recent rewards + recent jobs

post.description: Approves gardener and optionally assigns to supervisor. WhatsApp welcome message sent.

get.summary: Get zones assigned to a gardener

post.summary: Assign a zone to a gardener

delete.summary: Remove a zone from a gardener

put.summary: Update service zone pricing or boundaries
Update plan (price change creates PriceHikeLog automatically)

200.description: Plan updated. PriceHikeLog created if price changed.
Paginated subscriptions with customer and plan details
Paginated payment records with user info

post.summary: Apply immediate price hike to zones and/or plans
post.description: Applies percentage hike immediately. Creates PriceHikeLog for each affected item.

zone_ids.description: Zone IDs to apply hike to

plan_ids.description: Plan IDs to apply hike to

200.description: Applied. Returns list of changed items with old/new prices.

post.summary: Schedule a future automated price hike
post.description: Cron job runs daily at 2AM and applies due schedules.

delete.summary: Delete a pending scheduled price hike

200.description: Paginated price change history with old/new prices

post.summary: Create a blog post (draft or published)
Create or update a city SEO landing page

get.summary: List all add-on services including inactive (Admin)

max_arrival_delay_mins.description: Minutes after scheduled time before late_arrival breach is logged

get.description: Cron detects breaches hourly. Types: late_arrival, service_overtime.

200.description: Breaches with booking number and gardener details

put.summary: Mark an SLA breach as resolved

patch.summary: Manually reassign a gardener to a booking
patch.description: Admin or supervisor can replace the assigned gardener on any open booking. Sends WhatsApp notification to new gardener.

gardener_id.description: ID of the new gardener to assign

get.description: Returns customer profile, last 10 bookings, all subscriptions, last 10 payments, and lifetime stats (total bookings, total spent, avg rating).
